boundary.title: Something went wrong here

boundary.3dDescription: The 3D view hit an error — likely WebGL unavailable or invalid scene data. Switch to 2D to keep editing.

hero.subtitle: End-to-end AIGC architectural design automation — two product lines in one platform, from homeowner self-build to pro studio.
hero.heading: ArchiToken Architecture Platform
hero.subheading: From idea to render in 5 minutes: 4-point geometric constraints baked-in, prefab-component proposals, AI tweaks + human deepening.
hero.taglineEn: Integrated Design & Delivery Platform for Reconfigurable Prefabricated Housing

home.description: Benchmarked to maket.ai. Natural language → AI-generated floor plans and renders in under 10 minutes. Zero CAD background needed.

studio.description: Benchmarked to sooru.ai. Multi-proposal comparison, live 2D↔3D sync, Walkthrough mode, construction-grade export.
studio.feature4: PNG / PDF / DXF / OBJ / GLB / GLTF export

footer.description: INSOME is a prefab architecture tech company threading AIGC through the entire design pipeline.

scripted.step0: Hi, I'm INSOME Home. Tell me what kind of home you want — area, room count, style, anything.
scripted.step1: I want a 120 m² home with 3 beds, 2 baths, an open kitchen, and a small study.
scripted.step2: Got it. Generating <mark>3 candidate layouts</mark>… Nordic-modern leaning.
scripted.step3: The study is too small — can you push it to around 14 m²?
scripted.step4: Sure — bumping <mark>study 9 m² → 14 m²</mark>, shrinking the second bedroom accordingly.
scripted.step6: Yes — living and master both face south, daylight factor 0.42 meets GB Class I.
scripted.step8: Switched to Render view — toolbar at bottom can flip back to Chart.

home.offScriptReply: ✓ Updated per your request. Click any room on the canvas to fine-tune.

step1.title: Where do we start?
step1.uploadNotice: Plan upload will ship in Phase 4.

step2.title: Tell me about the home
step2.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Single-family, 3BR 2BA, open-plan kitchen, master suite with walk-in closet.

generating.title: Generating…
generating.sub: Your floor plan is on the way.

diff.c: C · fewer beds, large study, remote-work friendly

hint.select: Click any wall, room, or opening to view properties
hint.move-wall: Drag wall endpoints or segments; Esc to cancel
hint.move-room: Click a room then drag; shared walls deform adjacent rooms
hint.draw-wall: Click twice to draw a wall; Esc to cancel
hint.draw-room-rect: Click twice to draw a rectangle room (4 walls + 1 room, atomic)
hint.place-door: Click a wall to place a door
hint.place-window: Click a wall to place a window
hint.place-opening: Click a wall to place a passageway

edit.cannotDeleteSharedWall: Shared wall can't be deleted — detach or delete the owning room first

customization.scope: Affects the entire INSOME app (incl. Home); persists across reloads.

help.a1: Tabs at the top of the canvas. 3D ships Iso / Top / Perspective presets; editing still happens in 2D.
help.q2: How does the Build tool work?
help.a2: V select / W draw wall / R draw room / D place door / E place window / O place opening. Esc backs out of any state.
help.q3: Does Customization affect the Home app too?
help.a3: Yes. Accent / density / font scale are app-level globals; Home syncs automatically.

askAi.title: AI Assistant
askAi.description: Describe the change you want — AI returns an updated plan or parameter suggestion.
askAi.placeholder: What should change? e.g. make the master bedroom bigger / different style / add a study
askAi.hint: Press Send to run the demo script, or describe your own tweak.
